assertionsTested.title: Action passes when no negative feedback exists
assertionsTested.reason: With only positive/like ratings, action exits 0 and sets status=passed

evidence.output: [SPIKES] Found 0 blocking spike(s) / [SPIKES] ✨ CLEAN SLATE! No blocking feedback. Ship it.

assertionsTested.title: Action fails when negative feedback exceeds threshold
assertionsTested.reason: With 3 blocking spikes (meh/no ratings) and threshold=0, action exits 1 and sets status=failed

evidence.output: [SPIKES] Found 3 blocking spike(s) / ::error::💀 THE VIBES ARE OFF! 3 blocking spike(s) exceed threshold of 0
[SPIKES] Found 3 blocking spike(s) / [SPIKES] ✅ PASSED: 3 blocking spike(s) within threshold of 3

assertionsTested.title: Action respects ignore-paths filtering
assertionsTested.reason: Glob patterns in ignore-paths correctly exclude matching pages from blocking count

evidence.output: [SPIKES] Ignoring spike on page: /docs/api / [SPIKES] Found 2 blocking spike(s)
[SPIKES] Ignoring spike on page: /contact / [SPIKES] Found 2 blocking spike(s)

evidence.text: Fixture has 3 blocking: /contact(meh), /index(no), /docs/api(no). With /docs/** filter, /docs/api excluded -> 2 blocking. With /contact filter, /contact excluded -> 2 blocking.

assertionsTested.title: Action require-resolution mode fails on unresolved spikes
assertionsTested.reason: With require-resolution=true, ALL unresolved spikes (regardless of rating) count as blocking

evidence.output: [SPIKES] Require resolution: true / [SPIKES] Found 5 blocking spike(s) / ::error::💀 THE VIBES ARE OFF!
[SPIKES] Found 5 blocking spike(s) / [SPIKES] ✅ PASSED: 5 blocking spike(s) within threshold of 5

evidence.text: Fixture has 5 unresolved spikes (1-love, 1-like, 1-meh, 2-no) and 1 resolved. In require-resolution mode, all 5 unresolved are blocking regardless of positive/negative rating.

assertionsTested.title: Action handles missing .spikes/ directory gracefully
assertionsTested.reason: When .spikes/ directory doesn't exist, action passes with warning (default permissive behavior)

evidence.output: ::warning::🔥 No .spikes/ directory found. Clean slate — passing by default.
::warning::🔥 No spikes data found. Clean slate.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all passed (VAL-ACTION-002 through VAL-ACTION-006). GitHub Action runtime gate logic correctly implements: positive-only passing, threshold-based failure, ignore-paths glob filtering, require-resolution mode (all unresolved blocking), and graceful handling of missing .spikes/ directory.
